summary: Iteration 6: verified new shuffling deck + Reviews & ratings portal buttons. Backend: added test_google_url.py; 23/23 pytest cases pass. Frontend: shuffling-deck visible during spin, spin-result-card reveals ~1.5s, rate-on-google-button and per-card rate-on-google-{id} links carry valid google.com/maps URLs with target=_blank rel=noopener. Respin re-shuffles, Clear resets, sponsored badges (3) still first, AdUnit renders nothing (PUB_ID empty).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: initial Playwright wait_for_selector(spin-result-card) with visible=true occasionally times out because AnimatePresence starts the card at opacity 0; using wait_for_function on presence works reliably. Not a bug, just a testing note.
Consider adding data-testid on AdUnit root so tests can positively assert its no-render behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (source frontend/.env). All 23 tests pass. New file test_google_url.py verifies google_url is present, non-empty, https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=... URL for every curated item. Frontend uses AnimatePresence for the result card; prefer wait_for_function over wait_for_selector visible for spin-result-card.
